name: io.github.dappros/ethora-mcp-cli
description: MCP server for the Ethora chat/messaging platform: login, manage apps and chat rooms, broadcast messages, deploy AI bots with RAG sources, and use ERC-20 wallet tools. Supports user-auth and B2B/app-token flows.

environmentVariables.name: ETHORA_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Full Ethora API URL. Defaults to https://api.chat.ethora.com/v1 if neither ETHORA_API_URL nor ETHORA_BASE_URL is set.

environmentVariables.name: ETHORA_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base host URL (e.g. https://api.chat.ethora.com). The server appends /v1 automatically. Use ETHORA_API_URL instead if you need a non-/v1 path.

environmentVariables.name: ETHORA_APP_JWT
environmentVariables.description: App JWT used for the user-auth bootstrap flow (login/register). Usually starts with 'JWT '. Optional; can also be set at runtime via the ethora-configure tool.

environmentVariables.name: ETHORA_B2B_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: B2B server token used for tenant-actor x-custom-token auth (JWT with type=server). Required for B2B / app provisioning flows. Optional; can also be set at runtime.

environmentVariables.name: ETHORA_MCP_ENABLE_DANGEROUS_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to expose destructive tools (app deletion, wallet transfers, bulk delete). Disabled by default.
